title: Corrugated Packaging Box Manufacturer in Vietnam – Jinhao Xinyuan Group

blocks.text: Corrugated Packaging Box Manufacturer in Vietnam
High-strength B, E & BC flute boxes engineered for export performance and reliability.
Corrugated Packaging Box Manufacturer in Vietnam – Jinhao Xinyuan Group

Vietnam’s corrugated packaging industry is becoming a global powerhouse, and Jinhao Xinyuan Group is at the forefront. As a premium corrugated packaging box manufacturer in Vietnam, we specialize in producing high-strength corrugated boxes, retail packaging, and export-grade shipping cartons for international brands.

Our Vietnam factory integrates corrugation, offset printing, flexo printing, die-cutting, lamination, and ISTA-certified performance testing, giving customers complete reliability from raw paper to finished box. From B-flute, E-flute, and BC double-wall corrugated board to custom die-cut mailers, our solutions are engineered for strength, consistency, and competitive Vietnam manufacturing costs. With FSC® and ISO 9001 certifications, we deliver sustainable, durable corrugated packaging built for global supply chains.
Why Our Vietnam Corrugated Box Factory Is the Right Choice
Key Advantages

Jinhao Xinyuan Group doesn’t operate as a trading company or reseller — we are a fully integrated corrugated cardboard manufacturer with complete in-house production. Our Vietnam facility was built specifically for export-grade corrugated board and printed corrugated packaging, offering perfect stability for long-term volume programs.

We are one of the few Vietnam corrugated manufacturers with 2500 mm corrugation lines, direct offset printing for high-end graphics, and heavy-duty flexo capability for shipping cartons. This ensures consistent quality, competitive unit costs, and short lead times even at high volumes.
• Full in-house corrugation & board manufacturing
Full in-house corrugation & board manufacturing
• B, E & BC flutes for retail, shipping & industrial packaging
B, E & BC flutes for retail, shipping & industrial packaging
• Hybrid offset + flexo printing for premium branding
Hybrid offset + flexo printing for premium branding

Stable supply chain, modern automation, and competitive pricing
Our Vietnam factory gives international buyers a reliable alternative to China, with lower labor costs and strong logistics via Hai Phong Port.
Corrugated Board & Flute Types We Manufacture
As a full-service corrugated cardboard supplier, we produce a complete range of flute profiles for protective packaging, shipping, and retail display needs.
H3: Our Flute Options
• E-Flute: Fine, thin, ideal for high-resolution printed corrugated packaging
E-Flute: Fine, thin, ideal for high-resolution printed corrugated packaging
• B-Flute: Strong and versatile, used for standard shipping boxes
B-Flute: Strong and versatile, used for standard shipping boxes
• C-Flute: General structural corrugated packaging
C-Flute: General structural corrugated packaging
• BE-Flute (Double Wall): Lightweight but strong retail & e-commerce boxes
BE-Flute (Double Wall): Lightweight but strong retail & e-commerce boxes
• BC-Flute (Double Wall): Heavy-duty corrugated boxes for industrial loads
BC-Flute (Double Wall): Heavy-duty corrugated boxes for industrial loads

Each board type is engineered for compression strength, shock absorption, and stacking stability, making our Vietnam factory a preferred partner for global brands seeking reliable corrugated board boxes.
Our Product Range

Jinhao Xinyuan Group manufactures a complete range of corrugated packaging boxes. With integrated printing, die-cutting, corrugation, and gluing, we ensure every structure meets the functional and branding requirements of your industry.

Premium Printing for Corrugated Packaging

Jinhao Xinyuan Vietnam delivers printing quality unmatched by standard corrugated manufacturers. By combining offset printing for retail graphics with flexographic printing for transit cartons, we achieve both strength and branding impact.

Offset printing for litho-laminated corrugated packaging

1200×2500 mm 5-color flexo printing

Precision flute laminating for smooth printable surfaces

This makes our factory the ideal partner for brands that need retail-level print quality on corrugated packaging.
ISTA-Certified Testing for Export Corrugated Boxes
Our Vietnam facility features a fully equipped ISTA testing laboratory, allowing us to validate every corrugated packaging box according to international shipping simulation standards.
Testing Includes
• Compression Test – verifies stacking strength
Compression Test – verifies stacking strength
• Drop Test – ensures vertical/horizontal impact resistance
Drop Test – ensures vertical/horizontal impact resistance
• Random Vibration Test – simulates transport vibration
Random Vibration Test – simulates transport vibration
• Incline Impact Test – tests sudden load shifts
Incline Impact Test – tests sudden load shifts
• Bursting & ECT Testing – measures board strength
Bursting & ECT Testing – measures board strength
We supply export customers who require consistent performance for e-commerce, retail distribution, and industrial shipping.
FSC® & ISO-Certified Sustainable Production

Our corrugated packaging is produced from responsibly sourced paper meeting FSC® Chain of Custody requirements.Jinhao Xinyuan Vietnam operates under ISO 9001:2015, guaranteeing consistent process control, traceability, and high-quality corrugated manufacturing.

FSC-certified raw materials

100% recyclable corrugated cardboard

Waste reduction & recycling of offcuts

SMETA-compliant ethical sourcing
Our commitment to sustainability makes us one of the most reliable corrugated packaging companies in Vietnam for global retailers and importers.
About Our Corrugated Packaging Factory in Vietnam

Located in the Bac Giang / Bac Ninh region, our Vietnam factory covers more than 20,000 m² of modern production space with fully integrated corrugation and printing lines.We employ over 250 trained technicians and operate a continuous workflow from pre-press to finished carton.

Corrugation: B, E, BE & BC flute
